message:
feat(cli): Add user modification check before bundle installation

Prevents accidental overwriting of user-customized skill bundles during
reinstallation:

New Behavior:
- Before writing bundle files, checks if bundle has been modified
- Uses manifest's modification tracking to detect user changes
- If modified and --force not provided:
  - JSON mode: Returns { error: "modified_by_user", id, message }
  - Interactive: Shows yellow warning with suggestion to use --force
  - Exits with code 1
- --force flag bypasses the check and overwrites regardless

Implementation:
- Loads existing manifest early to check modification status
- Uses existing checkSkillModification() helper from manifest utils
- Checks canOverwrite property from modification check result

This protects users who have customized installed prompts from losing
their changes during updates, while still allowing explicit overwrites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
